hooks.command: email=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" config user.email 2>/dev/null); expected='p4569zz@gmail.com'; if [ "$email" = "$expected" ]; then msg="pixel_ui repo: git identity verified ($expected). Personal account active."; else display="${email:-(unset)}"; msg="⚠️ WARNING: pixel_ui repo git identity is $display, expected $expected. Fix: (cd \"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR\" && git config user.email $expected && git config user.name BottlePumpkin)"; fi; jq -n --arg m "$msg" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:$m}}'
